description_long: This object is a medieval-style sword with a long, straight, double-edged blade and a pointed tip, flanked by two smaller matching daggers. The central sword features a prominent crossguard and a rounded pommel, with a handle wrapped in a dark material, possibly leather, and adorned with a subtle pattern. The blade is metallic, highly polished, and tapers smoothly to a sharp point, reflecting light along its length. The two accompanying daggers share the same design language, with similar handles and crossguards, but are shorter and slimmer. The overall color scheme is dark, with black and metallic silver dominating the surfaces. The set appears robust and functional, suitable for display or practical use in a historical or fantasy urban context.
description: A medieval-style sword with a long, polished double-edged blade, black crossguard, and a wrapped handle, accompanied by two matching daggers. The set features dark tones and metallic highlights, with a robust and functional appearance.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full length of the sword and both daggers, highlighting the blade shapes, crossguards, and handle details.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thinness of the blades and the rounded pommels, with the handles and crossguards visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the blades and handles, with the metallic sheen and symmetry of the set clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the slim profile of the blades and the alignment of the handles and crossguards.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped in dark material, rounded pommel, subtle pattern
